name: Spring

aliases.name: Spring
aliases.comment:
Main Spring Type.
A spring's behavior is defined by its stiffness and damping parameters.
aliases.type: { stiffness : Float, damping : Float, position : a, velocity : a, destination : a }

values.name: andMap
values.type: Spring (a -> b) -> Spring a -> Spring b

values.name: animate
values.comment:
Animate a spring given a framerate.

    animate framerate spring

values.name: animateNested
values.comment: Animate a nested field inside a spring with a focus.
values.type: Focus a Float -> Time -> Spring a -> Spring a

values.name: animationHasEnded
values.comment:
Detect if a spring animation has ended.
A spring animation is considered to have ended if the spring
has reached its destination and has 0 velocity.

values.name: animationsHaveEnded
values.comment:
Given a list of foci, detect if a spring animation has ended.
A spring animation is considered to have ended if the spring
has reached its destination and has 0 velocity and this function will
only consider the fields defined by the foci.
values.type: List (Focus a Float) -> Spring a -> Bool

values.name: connect
values.comment:
Connect two springs together. This function will modify the second spring
to have the first spring's position as its destination.
values.type: Spring a -> Spring a -> Spring a

values.name: connectMany
values.comment:
Connect multiple strings end to end. The first spring's destination will be
set to the provided destination. The second spring's destination will be set to
the first spring's position. The third spring's destination will be set to
the second spring's position. And so on...

values.name: create
values.comment:
Create a Spring Float given values for stiffness and damping.
The Spring Float is the basic type of Spring and is the only one that
can be animated with the `animate` functon. You can use this as a building
block to create more complex Springs using functions like `map` or `andMap`.

values.name: createAt
values.comment: Create a spring with a given position.

values.name: current
values.comment: Get the current value of the spring.

values.name: map
values.comment: Map a function onto a spring.

values.name: map2
values.type: (a -> b -> c) -> Spring a -> Spring b -> Spring c

values.name: map3
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d) -> Spring a -> Spring b -> Spring c -> Spring d

values.name: map4
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> Spring a -> Spring b -> Spring c -> Spring d -> Spring e

values.name: map5
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f) -> Spring a -> Spring b -> Spring c -> Spring d -> Spring e -> Spring f

values.name: setDestination
values.comment: Set the destination of a spring.
